named_npcs.name: Alaana
named_npcs.role: Noble, high priestess, mystic, driven, ex-heretic
named_npcs.description: Noble, high priestess, mystic, driven, ex-heretic of Church of Stellar Flame. One of the official Hegemonic Cults. Each member is branded with the Kiss of Light. Faithful pray by bathing in as much light as they can bear.

named_npcs.name: Battle Sister Diana
named_npcs.description: battle-scarred, exo-suited, unstoppable of Church of Stellar Flame. One of the official Hegemonic Cults. Each member is branded with the Kiss of Light. Faithful pray by bathing in as much light as they can bear.

named_npcs.name: Iraam the Kind
named_npcs.description: inquisitor, plain, quiet, cruel of Church of Stellar Flame. One of the official Hegemonic Cults. Each member is branded with the Kiss of Light. Faithful pray by bathing in as much light as they can bear.

named_npcs.name: Torx Verron
named_npcs.description: chief executive, calculating, ruthless, expansionary of Counters Guild. Officials who maintain the galactic currency network and build shadow repositories in any system the Guild has a presence in, storing mysterious items and securing auctions and commerce. Members sign a contract for cycles of labor. Any breach can be punished harshly.

named_npcs.name: Rintar Ix
named_npcs.description: operations head, conniving, jealous, sly of Counters Guild. Officials who maintain the galactic currency network and build shadow repositories in any system the Guild has a presence in, storing mysterious items and securing auctions and commerce. Members sign a contract for cycles of labor. Any breach can be punished harshly.

named_npcs.name: Broq Vsigh
named_npcs.description: repository head, honorable, meticulous of Counters Guild. Officials who maintain the galactic currency network and build shadow repositories in any system the Guild has a presence in, storing mysterious items and securing auctions and commerce. Members sign a contract for cycles of labor. Any breach can be punished harshly.

named_npcs.name: Tallon 'the Butcher'
named_npcs.description: commander, disciplined, imposing, vicious of 51st Legion. A faction of the Hegemonic military, preparing a coup. There are oddly few xenos among the Legion.

named_npcs.name: Liyara
named_npcs.description: lieutenant, psychic, changed, eerie, loyal of 51st Legion. A faction of the Hegemonic military, preparing a coup. There are oddly few xenos among the Legion.

named_npcs.name: Wick
named_npcs.description: spy, xeno, unreadable, mysterious, loyal of 51st Legion. A faction of the Hegemonic military, preparing a coup. There are oddly few xenos among the Legion.

named_npcs.name: Lasaya al'Nim-Amar
named_npcs.description: Noble, mystic, brilliant, obsessed of Cult of the Seekers. Wandering mystics studying artifacts and exploring, looking to open the Hantu gate. Many are young ex-Legionnaires personally drafted by the Hegemon's mother.

named_npcs.name: Yor Brah-Rahim
named_npcs.description: explorer, hot-tempered, stressed of Cult of the Seekers. Wandering mystics studying artifacts and exploring, looking to open the Hantu gate. Many are young ex-Legionnaires personally drafted by the Hegemon's mother.

named_npcs.name: Qulocct
named_npcs.description: Memish, researcher, sharp, obsequious of Cult of the Seekers. Wandering mystics studying artifacts and exploring, looking to open the Hantu gate. Many are young ex-Legionnaires personally drafted by the Hegemon's mother.

named_npcs.name: Nicols al'Nim-Amar
named_npcs.description: leader, glib, hopeful of Concordiat Knights. Fourth and fifth children of Noble Houses who have taken an oath sanctioned by the Hegemon to seek the Light of the World. Each Knight is as distinct as they can be from each other.

named_npcs.name: Vnipe al'Vorron
named_npcs.description: priestess, renowned, bejeweled of Concordiat Knights. Fourth and fifth children of Noble Houses who have taken an oath sanctioned by the Hegemon to seek the Light of the World. Each Knight is as distinct as they can be from each other.

named_npcs.name: Junrai
named_npcs.description: explorer, death wish, restless of Concordiat Knights. Fourth and fifth children of Noble Houses who have taken an oath sanctioned by the Hegemon to seek the Light of the World. Each Knight is as distinct as they can be from each other.

named_npcs.name: Intal Brel
named_npcs.description: religious, vigilant, honorable of Concordiat Knights. Fourth and fifth children of Noble Houses who have taken an oath sanctioned by the Hegemon to seek the Light of the World. Each Knight is as distinct as they can be from each other.

named_npcs.name: Lexal
named_npcs.description: mystic, addicted, power-hungry, winged of The Agony. Human Cultists infecting themselves with Way creatures to access the universe in unsettling ways. Each member is changed in some highly visible way — extra limbs, semi-spectral forms, or many new mouths and eyes.

named_npcs.name: Iritha
named_npcs.description: mystic, many-limbed, glowing, powerful, potent of The Agony. Human Cultists infecting themselves with Way creatures to access the universe in unsettling ways. Each member is changed in some highly visible way — extra limbs, semi-spectral forms, or many new mouths and eyes.

named_npcs.name: Noro
named_npcs.description: mystic, calculating, enrapturing, elongated of The Agony. Human Cultists infecting themselves with Way creatures to access the universe in unsettling ways. Each member is changed in some highly visible way — extra limbs, semi-spectral forms, or many new mouths and eyes.

named_npcs.name: Urmak Theon
named_npcs.description: compassionate, educated, well spoken of Ashtari Cult. A Cult of Precursor worshipers claiming Ur descent. Each cult member wears a small vial of Ashtari gas to commune with their 'Ur past.'

named_npcs.name: Urmak Lesh
named_npcs.description: artificer, ex-Guilder, researcher of Ashtari Cult. A Cult of Precursor worshipers claiming Ur descent. Each cult member wears a small vial of Ashtari gas to commune with their 'Ur past.'

named_npcs.name: Urley Fean
named_npcs.description: Noble, cautious, hidden, influential of Ashtari Cult. A Cult of Precursor worshipers claiming Ur descent. Each cult member wears a small vial of Ashtari gas to commune with their 'Ur past.'

named_npcs.name: Rokono Maex
named_npcs.description: captain, scavenger, coarse, nonbeliever, stoic of Ashtari Cult. A Cult of Precursor worshipers claiming Ur descent. Each cult member wears a small vial of Ashtari gas to commune with their 'Ur past.'

named_npcs.name: Ashkad
named_npcs.description: charismatic, passionate, idealistic of Acolytes of Brashkadesh. A collective that eschews individuality. All members wear the same garb and use the same name. Attuning to the Pillar of Truth lets them share memories.

named_npcs.name: Ashkad
named_npcs.description: mystic, devout, artistic of Acolytes of Brashkadesh. A collective that eschews individuality. All members wear the same garb and use the same name. Attuning to the Pillar of Truth lets them share memories.

named_npcs.name: Ashkad
named_npcs.description: technician, skilled, liar, wealthy of Acolytes of Brashkadesh. A collective that eschews individuality. All members wear the same garb and use the same name. Attuning to the Pillar of Truth lets them share memories.

named_npcs.name: The Prime
named_npcs.description: ancient, powerful, mysterious, wise of Conclave 01. Independent, sentient Urbots led by an ancient Urbot known as the Prime, seeking free will and independence for all Urbots. All members are currently Urbots of varied shapes and sizes. Urbot spies pose as everyday servants.

named_npcs.name: Bar-Hazuk
named_npcs.description: gardener, huge, kind of Conclave 01. Independent, sentient Urbots led by an ancient Urbot known as the Prime, seeking free will and independence for all Urbots. All members are currently Urbots of varied shapes and sizes. Urbot spies pose as everyday servants.

named_npcs.name: Delta-7
named_npcs.description: architect, weapons platform, massive of Conclave 01. Independent, sentient Urbots led by an ancient Urbot known as the Prime, seeking free will and independence for all Urbots. All members are currently Urbots of varied shapes and sizes. Urbot spies pose as everyday servants.

named_npcs.name: Sp-d3r
named_npcs.description: hacker, infiltrator, cloaked, tiny of Conclave 01. Independent, sentient Urbots led by an ancient Urbot known as the Prime, seeking free will and independence for all Urbots. All members are currently Urbots of varied shapes and sizes. Urbot spies pose as everyday servants.

named_npcs.name: Pasha Qo'iin
named_npcs.description: sly, corpulent, sartorial, decadent of Ashen Knives. Once lean and battle ready, the Ashen Knives are a decadent Syndicate focused on drugs, gambling, and pleasures of the flesh. To join, Knives must take a life. Promotion requires doing unsavory tasks. Regional leaders are titled 'Pashas.'

named_npcs.name: Knife Lirik
named_npcs.description: xeno, assassin, gambler, deadly, graceful of Ashen Knives. Once lean and battle ready, the Ashen Knives are a decadent Syndicate focused on drugs, gambling, and pleasures of the flesh. To join, Knives must take a life. Promotion requires doing unsavory tasks. Regional leaders are titled 'Pashas.'

named_npcs.name: Oya
named_npcs.role: high ranking, greedy, well armed, natural leader
named_npcs.description: high ranking, greedy, well armed, natural leader of Ashen Knives. Once lean and battle ready, the Ashen Knives are a decadent Syndicate focused on drugs, gambling, and pleasures of the flesh. To join, Knives must take a life. Promotion requires doing unsavory tasks. Regional leaders are titled 'Pashas.'

named_npcs.name: Ria 'Keycard'
named_npcs.description: wizard-class hacker, ambitious, daring of Borniko Syndicate. A tightly knit group of thieves who steal high-end technological supplies. Joining involves pulling off a heist that impresses the leadership.

named_npcs.name: Nals E
named_npcs.description: Urboticist, gearhead, muscled of Borniko Syndicate. A tightly knit group of thieves who steal high-end technological supplies. Joining involves pulling off a heist that impresses the leadership.

named_npcs.name: MaxiMillions
named_npcs.description: arrogant, expert infiltrator, gorgeous of Borniko Syndicate. A tightly knit group of thieves who steal high-end technological supplies. Joining involves pulling off a heist that impresses the leadership.

named_npcs.name: Pip
named_npcs.description: mystic, xeno, small, unsettling of Borniko Syndicate. A tightly knit group of thieves who steal high-end technological supplies. Joining involves pulling off a heist that impresses the leadership.

named_npcs.name: Draxler
named_npcs.description: leader, killer, vengeful of Draxler's Raiders. Violent pirates who disable ships before boarding, ransoming crew and cargo alike. Almost all members are wanted for crimes. They've set their sights on eliminating Isotropa Max Secure.

named_npcs.name: Wudu 'Starhawk'
named_npcs.description: captain, loyal, vicious, wary of Draxler's Raiders. Violent pirates who disable ships before boarding, ransoming crew and cargo alike. Almost all members are wanted for crimes. They've set their sights on eliminating Isotropa Max Secure.

named_npcs.name: Samara 'She Wolf' Red
named_npcs.description: captain, enforcer, cold, physical of Draxler's Raiders. Violent pirates who disable ships before boarding, ransoming crew and cargo alike. Almost all members are wanted for crimes. They've set their sights on eliminating Isotropa Max Secure.

named_npcs.name: Viktor Bax
named_npcs.role: ruthless, insists on meeting every client personally
named_npcs.description: ruthless, insists on meeting every client personally of Janus Syndicate. Weapons dealers that specialize in ship weapons, headed up by the ruthless Viktor Bax, who insists on the first deal with every client in person. Viktor Bax meets every new client personally. No exceptions.

named_npcs.name: Jax
named_npcs.description: leader, cold, killer, arrogant of Cobalt Syndicate. Once a labor union, the Cobalt Syndicate has turned to smuggling and extortion to carve out shipping lanes and have a real say. Every member wears a solid blue stripe. A blue stripe on docks and warehouses is a call to action.

named_npcs.name: Keve
named_npcs.description: captain, augmented, defiant, enterprising of Cobalt Syndicate. Once a labor union, the Cobalt Syndicate has turned to smuggling and extortion to carve out shipping lanes and have a real say. Every member wears a solid blue stripe. A blue stripe on docks and warehouses is a call to action.

named_npcs.name: Sephua
named_npcs.role: Jax's sibling, thug, daring, envious, gambler
named_npcs.description: Jax's sibling, thug, daring, envious, gambler of Cobalt Syndicate. Once a labor union, the Cobalt Syndicate has turned to smuggling and extortion to carve out shipping lanes and have a real say. Every member wears a solid blue stripe. A blue stripe on docks and warehouses is a call to action.

named_npcs.name: Dyrinek
named_npcs.description: xeno, revolutionary, proud of Dyrinek Gang. Mostly young, disenfranchised xenos who have turned to crime and found strength and solidarity with each other. When a new member joins, they all go on a drunken tear across the city.

named_npcs.name: Burn
named_npcs.role: Memish mystic, xeno, fast, overconfident, untrained
named_npcs.description: Memish mystic, xeno, fast, overconfident, untrained of Dyrinek Gang. Mostly young, disenfranchised xenos who have turned to crime and found strength and solidarity with each other. When a new member joins, they all go on a drunken tear across the city.

named_npcs.name: Radds
named_npcs.description: human, hacker, smart of Dyrinek Gang. Mostly young, disenfranchised xenos who have turned to crime and found strength and solidarity with each other. When a new member joins, they all go on a drunken tear across the city.

named_npcs.name: Myrk
named_npcs.description: xeno, gun enthusiast, hothead of Dyrinek Gang. Mostly young, disenfranchised xenos who have turned to crime and found strength and solidarity with each other. When a new member joins, they all go on a drunken tear across the city.
